case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. MANUEL LAZARO UCAN COUOH

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-06-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY YESENIA TAFOLLA, LEGAL ADMINISTRATIVE ASSISTANT. DEFENDANT MANUEL LAZARO UCAN COUOH DID NOT APPEAR. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,135.12 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT COUOH, MANUEL LAZARO UCAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED JAN-29-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COUOH, MANUEL LAZARO UCAN
ORDER RE: PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COUOH, MANUEL LAZARO UCAN $285.12 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $370.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2017 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-06-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY NANCY ANGEL-HERRERA, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MANUAL LAZARO UCAN COUOH IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
